hero.title: Make a donation
hero.subtitle: Your act of love reaches the community directly

paypal.title: Donate via PayPal
paypal.instructions: Click the button to go to the PayPal payment page. Once the payment is complete, come back here and fill out the confirmation form.
paypal.notice: A note about our PayPal account
paypal.noticeText: Due to the financial restrictions we face as a Cuban organization, we are currently unable to hold a PayPal account of our own. For this reason, a teacher who deeply believes in our mission generously allows us to use his personal account to receive international donations on behalf of ACIKY (you must put exactly: "Donation ACIKY"). Every cent donated goes entirely to our community. We are deeply grateful for your understanding and your trust.

cup.title: Donate in CUP (bank transfer)
cup.instructions: Make a bank transfer or Transfermóvil to the details below. Then fill out the confirmation form with your transaction reference.

confirm.title: Confirm your donation
confirm.subtitle: After making the payment, fill out this form so we can record your donation.
confirm.name: Full name
confirm.transactionRefHint: PayPal ID or bank transaction number (e.g.: MM6047Q4FA987).
confirm.notesPlaceholder: Would you like to leave a message? (optional)
confirm.successMessage: We have received your confirmation. We will verify the payment and contact you if needed.
confirm.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields: name, email, and amount.
confirm.errorAmount: The amount must be a number greater than 0.
